guard_line_1: Halt! No one passes without the royal seal.
guard_line_2: The kingdom has been on edge since the shadow appeared.
merchant_line_1: Welcome! Care to browse my wares?
merchant_line_2: Business has been slow... too many monsters on the roads.
scholar_line_1: Fascinating... these ruins predate the old empire.
scholar_line_2: If only I could decipher the glyphs on the northern wall.
keeper_line_1: You have entered the dungeon depths. Few return.
keeper_line_2: The exit lies to the north. Tread carefully.
